sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17485" key="au)chte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐξ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n17485.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must amplify, exaggerate,</tr_> Men.Rh.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.359S.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
